lines: How big is the universe? Let's find out.
Jupiter. The giant. 11 times wider than Earth at 139,820 kilometers.
The Sun. 1.4 million kilometers. You could fit 1,300 Jupiters inside.
UY Scuti. One of the largest known stars. 2.4 billion kilometers across. It would swallow Saturn's orbit.
The Solar System. 18 billion kilometers from edge to edge.
The Milky Way. Our galaxy. 100,000 light years across. 950 quadrillion kilometers.
The Observable Universe. 93 billion light years. The scale is beyond human comprehension.
